reconciliation.horizontal: The initial blind protocol passed by a two-to-one majority, and both isolated eyeballs have positive rendered screen-X deltas.
reconciliation.vertical: The initial full-sheet vote was unstable, so three fresh independently randomized focused reviewers inspected identical-grid local cues; all three passed, and both eyeballs plus the head control have the required negative rendered screen-Y deltas.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: unchanged after focused and coordinate approval
